steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence already has a main verb: ensured (subject: lens). The blank must be a participial modifier describing the lens, not another finite verb.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "focued": Finite verb — creates two main verbs in one clause. Ungrammatical. ✗
  • "focuses": Finite verb — same problem as A. ✗
  • "focusing": Present participle — correctly modifies lens without competing with ensured. ✓
  • "focus": Misspelling of focused; grammatically wrong in this position. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
